inclusions: Products of animal origin, not elsewhere specified or included
Guts, bladders and stomachs of animals, whole and pieces thereof
Ivory (elephant, hippopotamus, walrus, narwhal and wild boar tusks, rhinoceros horns and the teeth of all animals)
Horsehair (hair of the manes or tails of equine or bovine animals) and horsehair waste

exclusions.condition: Edible products (other than guts, bladders and stomachs of animals, and animal blood)
Hides or skins (including furskins) other than goods of heading 05.05 and parings and similar waste of raw hides or skins of heading 05.11
Animal textile materials, other than horsehair and horsehair waste
Prepared knots or tufts for broom or brush making
